extDescription.message: Zero-knowledge password vault. 100% local. 100% free. Your passwords never leave your device.

cmdLockVault.description: Keyboard shortcut to lock the vault

cmdOpenVault.description: Keyboard shortcut to open the vault

masterPasswordSubtitle.message: This is the ONLY password you need to remember. We cannot recover it if you forget it.

recoveryPdfSubtitle.message: Download and print this document. Store it somewhere safe (not on your computer). This is your ONLY backup option.

passwordsFreeForever.message: Your passwords are now free. Forever.

noRecovery.message: I understand: If I lose this password, my data cannot be recovered. There is no "forgot password."

trustBadge.message: Your passwords never leave your device.
